data.title: Haffner Energy launches new C-iC modular units line to support mid-sized biofuel projects, addressing financing challenges.
data.description: Haffner Energy has recently released a new line of modular industrial units called C-iC, aiming to tackle the financial and deployment obstacles encountered by mid-size projects. This launch signifies a significant advancement in the company's offerings, with the new units specifically tailored to cater to projects that fall within a certain scale. By introducing this line, Haffner Energy is taking a proactive step to provide solutions to prevalent challenges in the industry.

data.title: Equinor ASA is conducting a share buy-back program for 2025 including the fourth tranche. No specific numbers are provided in this excerpt.
data.description: Below are details regarding the transactions completed as part of the fourth tranche of Equinor ASA's 2025 share buy-back program. Equinor ASA is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange (OSE) under the tickers EQNR, NYSE under EQNR, CEUX under EQNRO, and TQEX under EQNRO.

data.title: Tor Lønnum named CFO of Statkraft with 25 years of financial experience from various companies.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on 27 January 2026, Tor Lønnum has assumed the position of Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Statkraft. With over 25 years of extensive financial leadership expertise garnered from prominent Nordic and global corporations, Lønnum has held CFO positions within regulated, capital-intensive, and customer-centric sectors.

data.title: Castles Technology partners with Loomis Pay for European expansion using next-gen Android devices in VÉLIZY-VILLACOUBLAY, France.
data.description: A company based in Vélizy-Villacoublay, France, Castles Technology, has been chosen by Loomis Pay to assist in its expansion efforts in Europe.

data.title: Senator Marshall withdraws provision on card fees in crypto bill, requiring companies to compete on swipe fees, per report.
data.description: Last week, US Senator Roger Marshall introduced an amendment aimed at requiring companies to engage in competitive practices regarding swipe fees.

data.title: Rhino Investments Group buys Pleasant Valley Plaza, a grocery-anchored retail center in Oxnard, California - Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Oxnard, California, Rhino Investments Group, a commercial real estate investment company focused on value-add and necessity-based retail properties, disclosed the purchase of Pleasant Valley Plaza.
